description_long: This doll features a plush, textured brown body with visible white stitching along the seams, giving it a hand-sewn, patchwork appearance reminiscent of a sack or burlap toy. The head is large and rounded, with two oversized, solid white circular eyes and no visible mouth or nose, creating a simple, stylized face. The torso displays a zipper detail running vertically down the center, adding a playful, crafted element to the design. The arms and legs are short and rounded, with the hands and feet slightly oversized and shaped to suggest fingers and toes. The stitching is especially prominent along the sides of the head and limbs, enhancing the homemade, whimsical aesthetic. The overall look is soft and inviting, with a slightly worn, fuzzy surface texture.
description: A plush, brown, hand-sewn doll with white stitching, large white eyes, and a zipper detail on its torso. The surface is fuzzy and textured, with a whimsical, crafted appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large white eyes, zipper detail on the torso, and prominent stitching on the head and limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick white stitching running vertically along the head and body, with the profile of the face and zipper visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, with continuous white stitching and no facial features or zipper visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the white stitching along the head and body, and the side profile of the face.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll features a faux zipper on the torso, with visible white stitching resembling patchwork seams, and no separate garments or patterned clothing.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, arms relaxed and slightly bent at the sides, and legs straight and close together. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The face is neutral, with large, round, solid white eyes and no mouth or eyebrows, giving an expressionless, stylized look.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is covered in the same brown, textured fabric as the body, with white stitching details.
